# Boton Show more accommodations SERP (Movil)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->

## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/es/city/madrid
2. Wait 3 seconds
2. Scroll to the end of the results
3. Click to the button Show more accommodation
4. Scroll to the end of the results
5. Click to the button Show more accommodation
